src: A savory dish with beef Wellington, its golden-brown pastry crust encasing tender pink beef, resting in a dark, rich sauce. Served with herb-dusted carrots and potatoes on an elegant white plate.
edit: A fine dining dessert featuring a delicate pastry shell with a rich, dark chocolate ganache center, elegantly garnished with edible flowers. Served alongside caramel-glazed pieces and artisanal sugar decorations on an elegant plate.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object is centrally placed on a white plate with a black rim, framed by a fork on the left and a knife on the right, on a wooden table in soft ambient lighting.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object is positioned slightly to the right on the plate, surrounded by roasted carrots and potatoes, with a fork on the left and a knife on the right on a warmly lit wooden table.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object is set on the left side of an oval white plate, accompanied by carrots and potatoes, with flatware on either side on a polished wooden surface under cozy lighting.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object sits centrally on the plate, flanked by herb-roasted vegetables, with a fork to the left and a knife to the right on a wooden table in soft, relaxed lighting.
